title: Click a Button
description: Learn how to locate and click buttons using Playwright's locator strategies
objectives: Locate a button element using getByRole
Verify the result of the click
instructions:
Write a Playwright test that:
1. Opens https://demo.playwright.dev/todomvc
2. Clicks the 'What needs to be done?' input field
3. Types 'Test Task' and presses Enter
4. Verifies the task appears in the list

starterCode.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

def test_click_button(page: Page):
    # TODO: Navigate to the TodoMVC demo
    
    # TODO: Click the input field and type 'Test Task'
    
    # TODO: Press Enter to add the task
    
    # TODO: Verify the task appears
    pass

solution.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

def test_click_button(page: Page):
    page.goto('https://demo.playwright.dev/todomvc')
    input_field = page.get_by_placeholder('What needs to be done?')
    input_field.click()
    input_field.fill('Test Task')
    input_field.press('Enter')
    expect(page.get_by_text('Test Task')).to_be_visible()

hints: Use page.getByPlaceholder() to find input fields by placeholder text
Use .click() to focus on an element
Use .fill() to enter text into an input
Use expect().toBeVisible() to verify element visibility

testCases.name: Text is entered
testCases.expectedBehavior: Text is filled into the input field

testCases.name: Task is added
testCases.expectedBehavior: Task appears in the todo list
